title: grausa gayana
intro: Grausa gayana, also known as "Cassia auriculata" or "Neel kamal", is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Sri Lanka. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Grausa gayana include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Grausa gayana can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and balance.
